entry.title: The day the Earth became Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Philis283

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,949Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 226

Summary: Based on 'The Kryptonians who invaded Earth' the Kryptonians have run out of Omega's due to an unexplained viruses, so the travel to planets to find a comparable species which happens to be Earth. Where Kal finds his dream Omega called Bruce Wayne.

entry.title: The Cost of Hope
entry.summary:
Author: Barefoot_mouse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,860Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 32

Summary: “Mister…Batman?” the journalist cut in, stepping forward. From the corner of his eye, Bruce saw him tilt his head slightly, as if listening to something silent and distant. The nervousness drained from his face, replaced by a faint look of relief. “I’m sure if we just wait for the police—” “Where are you from?” Bruce interrupted again, squaring his shoulders, narrowing his eyes at the journalist. The man blinked in confusion. “I’m sorry?” he asked, tilting his head. But when Bruce kept staring, unmoving and silent, the journalist cleared his throat and rubbed the back of his neck again. “I’m from Metropolis, but I—” “You don’t belong here. Get out.” Or A story of identity crisis, violence, love, and hope.

entry.title: Superbat
entry.summary:
Author: guacwardd3

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,882Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Bruce is invited to a gala in Metropolis by Luthor and ends up meeting Clark Kent, a clumsy reporter from the Daily Planet. But what happens when Bruce thinks Clark has figured out his secret identity when Clark gets too nosy? Neither of them knows each other's true identity but can't help but feel a pull to one another. Clark wants to know why Bruce puts on a facade and Bruce wants to know how much Clark knows.

entry.title: This was not part of the VIP package
entry.summary:
Author: ThatStupidTheAlien

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,983Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 12

Summary: Bruce Wayne just wanted to be a good dad (and never be called an old man). What he didn't expect was to spend over $100,000 on a WWE VIP experience, survive a weekend in Vegas with three overly excited kids… and end up being the landing zone for his kids' favorite wrestler. Superman, the King of the Air, is used to calculating every jump with precision—until he misses and ends up falling right on top of Bruce Wayne. Between the lights, the matches, the autograph signings (and a Jason Todd on the verge of a breakdown after meeting Rhea Ripley), Bruce begins to discover that perhaps the most unexpected thing about the whole trip wasn't the fall… but the person who landed on him, which was definitely not part of the itinerary, much less the VIP package.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Meet Me On The Rooftop
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,561Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 161

Summary: Clark had gotten a note telling him to go to the rooftop of his building. He had no idea who sent him the note, so of course...he went. There he finds Batman. Batman who came here with a very strange proposition. Clark doesn't know what he's gonna do.   Inspired by tiiffycat's art on Instagram

entry.title: the whole world was here, waiting
entry.summary:
Author: Neery

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,236Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 412

Summary: In another universe, a much darker version of Batman has been holding Superman captive for a year. In this one, Bruce was only planning to neutralize an interdimensional threat. He didn’t plan on a rescue mission. He didn’t plan to take home a hurt, broken captive who may or may not be a version of the Clark Kent he knows. But now that he has, he needs to figure out what to do with him without putting the whole planet at risk. It takes Clark a while to realize he hasn’t just traded one abuser for another, more dangerous one.

entry.title: The Moon and his Sun
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,229Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 56

Summary: As the only heir to the kingdom of Gotham, Bruce Wayne is bound by duty to marry someone that he doesn't love: the daughter of the Demon's head, Talia al Ghul. He knows, more than anything, that he is expected to do this for the good of his people. Despite this, he can’t keep his desire for his knight, Clark, hidden. When all he wants to do is be pinned underneath Clark 24/7, how is he meant to fulfill his duty to his people?

entry.title: Everybody knows
entry.summary:
Author: LukeWinssmett

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,387Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 314

Summary: The room looks like a cell. Too clean. Too white. A simulation of comfort. Yet, enclosed in a kind of glass box, too big to hold a bed and a few basic things: it's a complete room with a metal door. And in the centre, sitting in a simple chair, is a man.At first, Conner thinks he is an employee. A technician. Someone who angered his father enough to end up locked up. Then the man raises his head. His eyes — blue, intense — open with a mixture of surprise and something more dangerous. Recognition. "Kon-El"

entry.title: Who the hell is Nightwing?
entry.summary:
Author: acebagle

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,715Chapters: 5/8Kudos: 248

Summary: "I would like to propose Nightwing. He is an-" "No." Batman interjected. "Batman, if you would allow me to finish my nomination then we may move on to the discussion." Diana said. "No. Nightwing will not be joining the Justice League." Batman stated, with a rigidity to his shoulders that Hal had rarely seen outside of a crisis. --- When Nightwing joins the Justice League Hal Jordan doesn't know what to make of him. Despite his easy-going personality Hal can sense deeper troubles underneath the surface and with his identity as secretive as Batman's its hard to get a clear picture. He seems to know far too much about their local Bat and is far to intimate to be 'just friends' with Roy. Or seven times Hal Jordan is confused about Nightwing's relationship with his fellow League members and one time that he understands.

entry.title: ooh child (things are gonna get easier)
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,514Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 201

Summary: Bruce smiles softly, then walks out of the living room. He taps on Janet’s contact, then puts his phone to his ear, hoping that she’ll finally pick up but knowing that it’ll likely go to voicemail again. Instead, three electronic beats rising in pitch play. “The number you have attempted to reach is no longer in service. Please hang up and check you have input the number correctly.” --------------------- Jack and Janet Drake flee the country, leaving Tim behind. Along with the rest of his family, Bruce does his best to pick up the pieces.

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,947Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 94

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father. This will go through the entire bat family until we catch 'em all

entry.title: Proof of Detection
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,940Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 69

Summary: The worst has already happened - Recognition, Rejection, devastation. Now Bruce and Clark are forced to work together to solve a mystery that could alter the course of the world, while helping to build the Justice League. Can Bruce live with what he's done? Can Clark forgive the ultimate betrayal? Will the League survive the fallout if they can't?

entry.title: The Three Body Problem of Soulmates
entry.summary:
Author: Justanotherfannerd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,206Chapters: 1/11Kudos: 6

Summary: Batman, no Bruce should be used to the end of the world by now. It’s certainly happened enough times to not be as terrifyingly concerning as the first time it happened, but this just seems to be a new way to tell the same story. He honestly wishes it was just his usual nonsense though.Clark thinks of himself as a pretty chill guy, not someone easily rattled. He only harms someone if his hand is forced and he certainly never thinks of killing anyone. . . but if he gets out of this without murdering Bruce? It’ll be nothing short of a miracle and he doesn’t believe in those much anymore.Or in other words!A non-traditional soulmate fic that drags Clark and Bruce through time and they're emotions! How fun!

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,668Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 333

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: Clinging onto Hope, Chasing Justice
entry.summary:
Author: dalrhna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,212Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 20

Summary: An unexpected meeting with the handsome, charming Bruce Wayne? Clark Kent is head-over-heels already. Little does he know, Bruce is just as obsessed.Or maybe... a bit more.When Superman approaches Batman to request a team-up, the Caped Crusader is apprehensive to say the least.But there is nothing he wouldn't do for Gotham. And something is coming. Something bigger than the both of them.How long will Clark have to keep chasing Bruce until they both realise what they truly need? How long will Bruce deny the strength of happiness and love? How long will they run in circles? Until they get their happily-ever-after? Or until they crash and burn with nothing left to offer?

entry.title: Chocolate Box

Author: Coffeetailor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,172Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

Summary: When Pamela, Harley, and Selena recruit Lois to get their boys to finally get together, Clark finds himself with some big trouble, and then a big boyfriend. Not the Valentine's date Bruce had in mind, but he is nothing if not creative.

entry.title: like grey skies (like a bird of paradise)
entry.summary:
Author: rainbow_nerds

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,299Chapters: 18/18Kudos: 658

Summary: He sighed to himself and downed the glass of champagne he'd been nursing—non-alcoholic, but enough to convince anyone who might give him a passing glance. He hated this, every time he had to do it. There was one surefire way to derail anyone who began wondering whether maybe Bruce Wayne was doing more than just donating funds to Batman. His tie hung loose around his neck, shirt unbuttoned to halfway down his chest, laughing too easily, pressing close to everyone he spoke to, whispering in ears, playing the part, until he turned and froze on the spot. Clark Kent, in his signature ill-fitting suit, stood holding a notebook and pen, staring at him with barely-concealed glee. Bruce cringed internally. He hated this. He especially hated when it had to be witnessed by someone he actually respected. or: After a Gala, Bruce and Clark end up in bed together. They're friends, just helping each other out, no strings attached. Which would be great, if Bruce hadn't been halfway to head-over-heels since the day they met.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Gravity of Small Things
entry.summary:
Author: Yevgeny

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,795Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Clark Kent has spent his entire college career becoming impossible to notice. Bruce Wayne has spent his becoming impossible to know. By all reasonable calculations, they should have stayed strangers—two people on a campus of twenty-eight thousand, each too committed to their own disappearing act to stumble into anyone else's. Reasonable calculations, as it turns out, do not account for assigned seating, a shared diner booth at eleven p.m., or the oldest rule in physics: that two things with enough mass, brought close enough together, will always—eventually, without fail—begin to pull.
